title: Síntiús
content:
# Síntiús

Choose a plan, manage your subscription, and understand what you get with Pro.

## Free vs Pro

Language Player is free to use, with an optional Pro upgrade that unlocks the full experience.

| Feature | Free | Pro |
|---|---|---|
| 600,000+ videos in 207+ languages | ✅ | ✅ |
| Dictionary with collocations, examples, and verb inflections | ✅ | ✅ |
| Chinese character decomposition | ✅ | ✅ |
| Interactive transcripts with translation | First 10 lines | Full transcript |
| Word examples in videos | 2 per word | Hundreds per word |
| AI-powered word explanations | — | ✅ |
| Priority support | — | ✅ |

## Plans

| Plan | Price | Billing |
|---|---|---|
| **Monthly** | US$10/mo | Billeáilte go míosúil. Cancel anytime. |
| **Annual** | US$90/yr | Billeáilte go bliantúil. Save 25% vs monthly. |
| **Lifetime** | US$169 | Ní théann as feidhm riamh. Íoc uair amháin, faigh rochtain go deo. |

All plans include a Ráthaíocht airgid ar ais 14 lá. Ceisteanna?

## How to Upgrade

1. Open your **[Próifíl](/docs/account/profile)** from the top-right menu
2. Scroll to the **Subscription** section
3. Click **Uasghrádaigh go Pro** (or **Uasghrádaigh** if you're already on a Pro plan)
4. Choose a plan — Monthly, Annual, or Lifetime
5. Pick a payment method and complete checkout

After payment, you'll be redirected to a confirmation page. Your Pro features are active immediately — no need to log out or refresh.

## Payment Methods

| Method | Available for | Currency |
|---|---|---|
| Cárta Creidmheasa | All plans | USD |
| Íocaíocht WeChat | All plans | CNY |
| Alipay | All plans | CNY |
| Tá PayPal ar fáil freisin do cheannacháin ar feadh an tsaoil. | Lifetime only | USD |

Credit card payments are processed securely through Stripe. Your card details are never stored on our servers.

## Managing Your Subscription

### Check Your Status

Your current plan, billing cycle, and renewal date are shown on your **[Próifíl](/docs/account/profile)** page under the Subscription section.

### Cancel Auto-Renewal

Monthly and Annual plans renew automatically. To stop auto-renewal:

1. Go to your **[Próifíl](/docs/account/profile)**
2. In the Subscription section, click **Cealaigh Athnuachan Uathoibríoch**
3. Confirm by clicking **Deimhnigh cealú**

Your Pro access continues until the end of your current billing period. After that, your account returns to Free and you'll keep all your saved words, watch history, and settings.

### Renew an Expired Subscription

If your Pro subscription expired, click **Athnuaigh** on your profile page to subscribe again. All your data is preserved — nothing is lost when a subscription lapses.

### Upgrade Your Plan

You can upgrade from Monthly to Annual or Lifetime at any time:

1. Go to your **[Próifíl](/docs/account/profile)**
2. Click **Uasghrádaigh** in the Subscription section
3. Choose your new plan and complete payment

When you upgrade, the remaining value of your current plan is credited toward the new one. Your new billing cycle starts immediately.

## Tips

- The Téigh Pro page shows real-time prices — no hidden fees or taxes added at checkout
- Lifetime is a one-time payment with no recurring charges — 1. Ag glacadh leis go mairfidh tú níos faide ná 2.4 bliain.
- Cancelling auto-renewal doesn't delete anything — you keep full Pro access until the period ends
- If you run into payment issues, contact [Tacaíocht ríomhphoist](mailto:jon.long@zerotohero.ca) and we'll help within 24 hours

title: Logging In
content:
# Logáil Isteach

Sínigh isteach i do chuntas, athshocraigh pasfhocal dearmadta, agus sínigh amach nuair atá tú réidh.

## Conas Logáil Isteach

1. Téigh go dtí an **[leathanach logála isteach](/login)** trí chliceáil ar dheilbhín an úsáideora sa chúinne uachtarach ar dheis agus roghnaigh **Logáil isteach**
2. Iontráil do **Ríomhphost** agus **Pasfhocal**
3. Cliceáil **Logáil isteach**

Má tá do chuid dintiúr ceart, atreorófar tú go dtí an leathanach roghnaithe teanga (nó ar ais go dtí an leathanach a raibh tú air sular logáil tú isteach).

Má iontrálann tú an ríomhphost nó an pasfhocal mícheart, beidh teachtaireacht earráide le feiceáil — seiceáil an dá réimse arís agus déan iarracht eile.

## Nach Bhfuil Cuntas Agat?

Cliceáil **Cláraigh** faoi bhun an fhoirm logála isteach chun cuntas nua a chruthú. Féach ar [Clárú](/docs/account/registration) le haghaidh an tsiúil iomláin clárúcháin.

## Dearmad Déanta ar Do Phasfhocal?

Mura cuimhin leat do phasfhocal:

1. Ar an leathanach logála isteach, cliceáil **An ndearna tú dearmad ar do phasfhocal?**
2. Iontráil do sheoladh ríomhphoist agus cliceáil **Seol nasc athshocraithe**
3. Seiceáil do bhosca isteach le haghaidh ríomhphost athshocraithe pasfhocail
4. Lean an nasc sa ríomhphost chun pasfhocal nua a shocrú

Ar mhaithe le slándáil, taispeánann an leathanach teachtaireacht rathúil i gcónaí tar éis duit é a sheoladh — fiú mura bhfuil an ríomhphost cláraithe. Coscann sé seo ar dhuine ar bith a sheiceáil an bhfuil cuntas ag ríomhphost ar leith.

> **Nóta:** Tagann an nasc athshocraithe pasfhocail ó Directus, ár soláthraí céannachta. Mura bhfeiceann tú an ríomhphost laistigh de chúpla nóiméad, seiceáil d'fhillteán turscair.

## Conas Logáil Amach

Cliceáil ar dheilbhín an úsáideora sa chúinne uachtarach ar dheis (taispeánann sé do chéad litir), ansin cliceáil **Logáil amach** ag bun an roghchláir. Sínfear amach thú agus atreorófar go dtí an leathanach baile thú.

Glanann logáil amach do sheisiún áitiúil, ach coimeádtar do chuid focal sábháilte, stair faire, agus socruithe — cuirfear ar ais iad an chéad uair eile a shínfidh tú isteach.

## Cuntais a Athrú

Chun athrú go cuntas eile, logáil amach ar dtús, ansin logáil isteach leis an seoladh ríomhphoist eile. Níl aon athróir cuntas ann — úsáideann gach seisiún brabhsálaí cuntas amháin ag an am.

## Leideanna

- Maireann do sheisiún logála isteach tar éis atosú brabhsálaí — ní bheidh ort logáil isteach gach uair a thugann tú cuairt
- Má tá tú ar ghléas comhroinnte, logáil amach i gcónaí nuair atá tú réidh
- Oibríonn sreabhadh an phasfhocail dhearmadta fiú má chláraigh tú leis an ríomhphost céanna — seolann sé nasc athshocraithe pé scéal é
- Is féidir leat do shonraí cuntais a bhainistiú ó do **[Próifíl](/docs/account/profile)**

title: Próifíl
content:
# Próifíl

Taispeánann do leathanach próifíle faisnéis chuntais, leibhéal teanga, stádas síntiúis, stair féachana, agus focail shábháilte — go léir in áit amháin.

## Faisnéis Chuntais

Ag barr an leathanaigh feicfidh tú d’ainm taispeána agus do sheoladh ríomhphoist. Seo é an fhaisnéis atá nasctha le do chuntas — an méid a d’úsáid tú nuair a chláraigh tú.

## Leibhéal Teanga

Ligeann an chuid **Socruithe** duit do leibhéal inniúlachta a shocrú don sprioctheanga reatha. Roghnaigh ón roghchlár anuas chun do chumas a mheaitseáil:

- **Sínis** taispeánann leibhéil HSK (1 go 7-9)
- **Seapáinis** taispeánann leibhéil JLPT (Ré-N5 go N1)
- **Cóiréis** taispeánann leibhéil TOPIK (Ré-1 go 6)
- **Béarla** taispeánann leibhéil IELTS (1 go 9)
- **Gach teanga eile** taispeánann leibhéil CEFR (Ré-A1 go C2)

Úsáidtear do leibhéal chun moltaí físeáin a scagadh ar an leathanach [Fiosraigh](/docs/media/explore) agus chun suaitheantais deacrachta daite a chur ar chártaí físeáin. Is féidir leat é a athrú am ar bith — déantar do chuid moltaí a nuashonrú láithreach.

## Síntiús

Taispeánann an chuid **Síntiús** do phlean reatha agus ligeann sé duit é a bhainistiú.

### Cuntas Saor in Aisce

Má tá cuntas saor in aisce agat, feicfidh tú suaitheantas **Cuntas Saor in Aisce** agus trí chárta plean — Míosúil ($10/mí), Bliantúil ($90/bliain), agus Saoil ($169). Cliceáil **Uasghrádaigh go Pro** chun dul go dtí an leathanach [Téigh Pro](/docs/account/billing) agus plean a roghnú.

### Síntiús Gníomhach Pro

Má tá síntiús gníomhach agat, feicfidh tú:

- Suaitheantas **Míosúil**, **Bliantúil**, nó **Saoil**
- Laethanta fágtha go dtí an t-athnuachan (pleananna míosúla agus bliantúla)
- Suaitheantas **Athnuachan uathoibríoch** má tá féin-athnuachan ar siúl
- An modh íocaíochta a úsáideadh (Stripe, PayPal, nó Apple App Store)

As seo is féidir leat:

- **Cealaigh Athnuachan Uathoibríoch** — stopann sé féin-athnuachan ag deireadh do thréimhse billeála reatha. Fanann do rochtain Pro gníomhach go dtí sin.
- **Uasghrádaigh** — athraigh ó Mhíosúil go Bliantúil, nó ó aon phlean go Saoil
- **Uasghrádaigh go Saolré** — íocaíocht aon-uaire $169 le haghaidh rochtain bhuan Pro

### Síntiús Éagtha

Má tá do shíntiús críochnaithe, feicfidh tú suaitheantas dearg éagtha agus cnaipe **Athnuaigh**. Coinnítear na focail shábháilte, stair féachana, agus socruithe go léir — níl le déanamh ach athnuachan chun leanúint ar aghaidh ón áit ar fhág tú.

## Stair Féachana

Taispeánann an chuid **Stair féachana** na 5 físeán is déanaí a d’fhéach tú orthu, le mionsamhlacha agus faid. Cliceáil aon fhíseán chun athsheinm a atosú ón áit ar stop tú, le do stair féachana iomlán luchtú mar scuaine.

Cliceáil **Féach Uile** chun an leathanach iomlán [Stair féachana](/docs/media/watch-history) a oscailt, áit ar féidir leat brabhsáil, cuardach, agus athsheinm a dhéanamh ar gach físeán a d’fhéach tú sa teanga seo.

## Focail Shábháilte

Taispeánann an chuid **Focail shábháilte** na 10 bhfocal is déanaí a shábháil tú don sprioctheanga reatha. Taispeánann gach iontráil an focal agus an físeán as ar tháinig sé — cliceáil focal chun a iontráil fhoclóra a oscailt, nó cliceáil **Féach Uile** chun do stór focal iomlán a bhrabhsáil ar an leathanach [Focail shábháilte](/docs/vocab/saved-words).

## Leideanna

- Tá do leibhéal teanga in aghaidh na teanga — ní dhéanfaidh leibhéal Sínis a shocrú go HSK 3 difear do do leibhéal Seapáinis
- Ní thaispeánann na codanna Stair féachana agus Focail shábháilte ach ábhar don sprioctheanga reatha — athraigh L2 sa cheanntásc chun teangacha eile a fheiceáil
- Ráthaíocht airgid ar ais 14 lá. Ceisteanna? [Déan teagmháil linn](mailto:jon.long@zerotohero.ca)
- Coinníonn cealú féin-athnuachana do ghnéithe Pro gníomhach go dtí deireadh do thréimhse billeála — ní chuirtear isteach ar aon rud go luath

title: Language Switcher
content:
# Athraithe Teanga

Oibríonn Imreoir Teanga le péire teanga — an teanga a labhraíonn tú agus an teanga atá á foghlaim agat. Tógtar gach rud san aip timpeall ar an bpéire seo: bíonn an comhéadan i do theanga féin, bíonn físeáin agus iontrálacha foclóra i do theanga foghlama, agus téann aistriúcháin idir an dá cheann.

Roghnaíonn tú do phéire nuair a chláraíonn tú den chéad uair, agus is féidir leat é a athrú am ar bith ón gceannteideal.

## Do Phéire Teanga

Úsáideann Imreoir Teanga dhá theanga i gcónaí:

- **L1** — Do theanga dhúchais. Is í seo an teanga a bhfeictear an comhéadan, na roghchláir, agus na cnaipí inti. Is í freisin an teanga a ndéantar aistriúcháin isteach inti.
- **L2** — An teanga atá á foghlaim agat. Bíonn físeáin, fotheidil, agus torthaí foclóra ar fad sa teanga seo.

Mar shampla, má labhraíonn tú Béarla agus má tá Seapáinis á foghlaim agat, is é do phéire ná Béarla → Seapáinis. Bíonn an comhéadan i Béarla, seinntear físeáin i Seapáinis, agus téann aistriúcháin ó Seapáinis go Béarla.

## An Chéad Chuairt — Céim Thosaithe

An chéad uair a osclaíonn tú Imreoir Teanga, feicfidh tú an roghnóir teanga. Tá dhá cholún ann taobh le taobh:

- **Colún clé** — **Labhraím**. Roghnaigh an teanga is compordaí duit. Is í seo do L1.
- **Colún deas** — **Tá mé ag foghlaim**. Roghnaigh an teanga is mian leat a fhoghlaim. Is í seo do L2.

Tá barra cuardaigh ag barr gach colúin. Tosaigh ag clóscríobh chun do theanga a aimsiú, nó scrollaigh tríd an liosta. Taispeántar teangacha coitianta ar dtús, agus ina dhiaidh sin na teangacha ar fad in ord aibítre.

Cliceáil ar theanga chun í a roghnú. Aibhsítear do rogha — gorm do L1, oráiste do L2. Nuair a bheidh an dá cheann roghnaithe agat, feicfear cnaipe **Lean ar aghaidh** ag an mbun. Cliceáil air chun tús a úsáid le Imreoir Teanga le do phéire roghnaithe.

### Rogha Scripte na Sínise

Má roghnaíonn tú Sínis mar do L2, feicfear scorán scripte idir an dá cholún tar éis duit é a roghnú. Roghnaigh idir:

- **简体 Simplithe** — Carachtair a úsáidtear i mórthír na Síne agus i Singeapór
- **繁体 Traidisiúnta** — Carachtair a úsáidtear i Taiwan, Hong Cong, agus Macau

Is féidir leat an rogha seo a athrú níos déanaí i [Socruithe](/docs/general/settings), faoin rogha **Tacar carachtar** sa chluaisín Taispeáin.

## Teangacha a Athrú — An tAthraitheoir sa Cheannteideal

Nuair a bheidh an chéim thosaithe críochnaithe agat, taispeántar do phéire teanga reatha sa cheannteideal ag barr gach leathanaigh. Breathnaíonn sé mar dhá lipéad teanga le cnaipe malairte eatarthu.

Cliceáil ar cheachtar lipéad teanga chun roghchlár anuas a oscailt. Tá barra cuardaigh agus liosta inscrollaithe sa roghchlár anuas — na codanna céanna Coitianta agus Gach Teanga agus atá ar an leathanach tosaithe. Cliceáil ar theanga nua chun athrú. Lódálann an leathanach arís le do phéire nua, agus nuashonraíonn gach rud: teanga an chomhéadain, na físeáin a thaispeántar, an foclóir, agus do chuid focal sábháilte.

### Teangacha a Mhalartú

Idir an dá lipéad teanga tá cnaipe malairte (dhá shaighead, ↔). Cliceáil air chun do phéire a aisiompú — déantar do L1 mar L2, agus do L2 mar L1. Ní oibríonn sé seo ach amháin má tá do L2 ar fáil freisin mar theanga chomhéadain (ceann de na 31 teanga UI atá tacaithe). Mura bhfuil, níl aon éifeacht ag an gcnaipe.

Tá malartú úsáideach nuair is mian leat an aip a fheiceáil ón bpeirspictíocht eile — mar shampla, más cainteoir Seapáinis tú ag foghlaim Béarla, malartaigh chun an comhéadan a fheiceáil i Seapáinis agus iontrálacha foclóra i Béarla.

## Cad a Athraíonn Nuair a Athraíonn Tú

Bíonn tionchar ag athrú do phéire teanga ar bheagnach gach rud san aip:

| Cad a athraíonn | Sonraí |
|---|---|
| **Teanga an chomhéadain** | Athraíonn na roghchláir, na cnaipí, agus na lipéid ar fad go dtí do L1 nua |
| **Físeáin** | Taispeánann Fiosraigh, Cláir Theilifíse, agus Teilifís Bheo ábhar i do L2 nua |
| **Foclóir** | Athraíonn an foclóir go dtí do phéire L2 ↔ L1 nua. Feictear sainmhínithe i do L1 nua |
| **Focail shábháilte** | Bíonn liostaí foclóra de réir teanga. Má athraíonn tú go L2 difriúil, taispeántar focail shábháilte na teanga sin |
| **Socruithe** | Athraíonn socruithe de réir teanga (cosúil le foghraíocht agus guth) chun teacht le do L2 nua |
| **Cuardach** | Díríonn cuardach físeán agus cuardach foclóra ar do L2 nua |

Sábháiltear do stair féachana, focail shábháilte, agus socruithe ar fad de réir teanga — ní chailltear aon rud nuair a athraíonn tú.

## Cuardach Teangacha

Tá barra cuardaigh ag an roghnóir tosaithe agus ag an roghchlár anuas sa cheannteideal araon. Clóscríobh chun an liosta teangacha a scagadh láithreach. Meaitseálann an cuardach in aghaidh:

- Ainm na teanga ina script féin (m.sh., 日本語, Español)
- An t-ainm logánta i do theanga chomhéadain reatha
- An t-ainm Béarla
- Cód ISO na teanga (m.sh., `ja`, `es`, `zh`)

Glan an cuardach chun an liosta iomlán a fheiceáil arís le teangacha Coitianta ag an mbarr.

## Leideanna

- Roghnaigh do **theanga is láidre i ndáiríre** mar L1, ní an teanga a bhfuiltear ag súil leat a labhairt. Braitheann aistriúcháin chruinne air seo.
- Bain úsáid as an gcnaipe malairte chun a sheiceáil conas a fhéachann an aip i do L2 — is bealach tapa é chun do thuiscint léitheoireachta a thástáil.
- Má tá ilteangacha á bhfoghlaim agat, aistrigh eatarthu ón gceannteideal. Coinnítear do dhul chun cinn ar leithligh do gach ceann.
- Cuimhneoidh an scorán scripte do Sínis ar do rogha, mar sin ní gá duit é a shocrú ach uair amháin.
- Sábháiltear do phéire teanga is déanaí i do bhrabhsálaí. An chéad uair eile a thugann tú cuairt, rachaidh tú díreach chuig d'ábhar — ní gá roghnú arís.

title: Getting Started
content:
# Getting Started

Welcome to Imreoir Teanga — learn any language by watching real videos with interactive subtitles. Click any word to see its definition, save it to your vocabulary, and let the app schedule reviews so you never forget.

This guide walks you through everything from creating an account to watching your first video.

## Create a Free Account

You can browse Imreoir Teanga without an account, but signing up lets you save words, track your watch history, and sync your progress across devices.

1. Click **Cláraigh** in the top-right corner
2. Enter your email and a password
3. Check your inbox for a verification code — enter it to confirm your email
4. You're in! Your account is free and stays free

A Cuntas Saor in Aisce gives you access to 600,000+ videos across 207+ languages, the full dictionary, and spaced repetition review. See [Síntiús](/docs/account/billing) for what's included and how to upgrade if you want more.

## Choose Your Languages

Imreoir Teanga works with a **language pair** — your native language (L1) and the language you're learning (L2). Pick both to get started.

### First Time

When you sign up, you'll see the language selection page with two columns:

- **Left column** — Roghnaigh do theangacha chun tosú (your native language). This sets the app's interface language.
- **Right column** — your target language (the one you want to learn).

Type to search. You can search by the language's **native name**, its **English name**, or its **ISO code**. For example, to find Seapáinis, you can type `日本語`, `Japanese`, or `ja`.

If you're learning Sínis, a toggle appears below the search bar to switch between Simplified and Traditional characters.

Click a language in each column, then click **Tosaigh ag foghlaim** at the bottom. Your choices are saved in the URL and remembered across sessions.

### Switching Later

You can change either language at any time from the header. Click the language name in the top bar to open a dropdown, or use the **swap button** between the two language labels to flip your pair (L1 ↔ L2). See [[?title.language_switcher]](/docs/general/language-switcher) for all the ways to switch.

## Watch Your First Video

The fastest way to get started:

1. Go to **Fiosraigh** from the sidebar or navigation menu
2. You'll see a grid of video cards — each one has a thumbnail, a difficulty badge (like CEFR A1 or HSK 3), and a view count
3. Use the **level filter pills** at the top to find videos at your proficiency level
4. Click any video to open the [Léitheoireacht](/docs/media/video-player)

The video player shows interactive subtitles beside the video. Every word is clickable — tap a word to see its definition, pronunciation, and a bookmark button to save it to your vocabulary list. Translations appear below each subtitle line in your native language.

See [Fiosraigh](/docs/media/explore) for details on filtering, channel subscriptions, and difficulty scoring.

## What You Can Do

Imreoir Teanga has more than just videos. Here's what's available:

| Feature | What it does | Where |
|---|---|---|
| **Interactive video player** | Watch with dual subtitles and clickable words | [Fiosraigh](/docs/media/explore) → click any video |
| **Foclóir** | Look up any word, see conjugations, get AI explanations | **Stór focal** → [Foclóir](/docs/vocab/dictionary) |
| **Focail shábháilte** | Build your personal vocabulary list | Click the bookmark icon on any word |
| **Athbhreithniú** | Spaced repetition flashcards for your saved words | **Stór focal** → [Athbhreithniú](/docs/vocab/review) |
| **Léitheoir** | Paste or write text, read with interactive word lookup | **Léitheoireacht** → [Léitheoir](/docs/reading/reader) |
| **Cláir Theilifíse** | Browse TV series with full episode queues | **Nótaí** → [Cláir Theilifíse](/docs/media/tv-shows) |
| **Teilifís Bheo** | Stream live broadcasts in your target language | [Teilifís Bheo](/docs/media/live-tv) |
| **Ceol agus Siamsaíocht** | Music videos and entertainment content | [Ceol agus Siamsaíocht](/docs/media/music) |
| **Cuardaigh** | Find videos by title or paste any YouTube URL | [Cuardaigh](/docs/media/search) |

## Build Your Vocabulary

As you watch, click unfamiliar words and click the bookmark icon to save them. Over time, you'll build a personal vocabulary list organized by the date you saved each word.

Your saved words feed into the [Athbhreithniú](/docs/vocab/review) system — the app schedules flashcards so you review each word just before you'd forget it. Each card shows the original sentence where you found the word, so you're always learning in context.

See [Popup Dictionary](/docs/vocab/popup-dictionary) for how word lookup works, and [Focail shábháilte](/docs/vocab/saved-words) for managing your vocabulary list.

## Free vs Pro

Imreoir Teanga is free to use. The Pro upgrade unlocks:

- Full interactive transcripts with translation (free accounts see the first 10 lines)
- Hundreds of video examples per word (free accounts see 2)
- AI-powered word explanations
- Priority support

Plans start at US$10/mo with a Ráthaíocht airgid ar ais 14 lá. Ceisteanna?. See [Síntiús](/docs/account/billing) for all plans, payment methods, and what's included.

## Customize Your Experience

Open [Socruithe](/docs/general/settings) from your profile menu to adjust:

- **Taispeáin** — Theme, translation toggle, phonetics (pinyin, furigana), font size, character set
- **Athsheinm** — Playback speed, auto-pause, karaoke animation, smooth scrolling
- **Urlabhra** — Text-to-speech voice and rate for word pronunciation
- **Athbhreithniú** — How many new vocabulary cards to introduce per day (default: 20)

Socruithe save automatically and sync across your devices when you're signed in.

## Tips

- **Click everything.** Words in subtitles, words in the dictionary, words in your saved list — they're all interactive.
- **Set your proficiency level** on your [Próifíl](/docs/account/profile) so Fiosraigh starts with the right level filter.
- **Save words as you watch**, not after. The bookmark button is one click and keeps you in the flow.
- **Use keyboard shortcuts** in the video player — Space for play/pause, ←/→ to jump between subtitle lines, R to rewind 2 seconds.
- **Switch languages anytime** from the header. Your settings, saved words, and watch history are tracked per language pair.
- **Read the docs** — each feature page ends with a Tips section that covers shortcuts and workflows you might miss otherwise.

title: Fiosraigh
content:
# Fiosraigh

Faigh amach físeáin i do sprioctheanga, a mheaitseálann do leibhéal.

## Conas a Oibríonn Sé

Taispeánann an leathanach Fiosraigh físeáin mholta do do phéire teanga. Tagann gach físeán ó YouTube agus roghnaítear iad le haghaidh foghlaim teanga — ní chuimhnímid ábhar ceoil agus siamsaíochta (tá leathanach dá gcuid féin ag na cinn sin ag [Ceol agus Siamsaíocht](/docs/media/music)).

Sórtáiltear físeáin de réir an éilimh agus scagtar iad de réir deacrachta nuair a roghnaíonn tú leibhéal. Foghlaimíonn an moltóir ó do stair féachana, mar sin ní bheidh físeáin a d'fhéach tú cheana le feiceáil arís.

## Scagaire Leibhéil

Ligeann na pillíní ag an mbarr duit scagadh de réir leibhéil inniúlachta. Tagann na lipéid le do sprioctheanga:

| L2 | Taispeánann na Pillíní |
|---|---|
| Sínis | HSK 1 → HSK 7-9 |
| Seapáinis | JLPT Pre-N5 → N1 |
| Cóiréis | TOPIK Pre-1 → 6 |
| Béarla | IELTS 1 → 9 |
| Cinn Eile | CEFR Pre-A1 → C2 |

Cliceáil pillín chun físeáin a scagadh ag an leibhéal sin. Cliceáil **Uile** chun físeáin a fheiceáil ag gach leibhéal. Cuimhneofar an rogha a dhéanann tú agus tú ag brabhsáil, agus athshocrófar é go dtí do leibhéal inniúlachta sábháilte nuair a fhilleann tú.

## Cártaí Físeán

Taispeánann gach cárta **suaitheantas leibhéil** daite ar chlé ag an mbarr. Féach [Conas a Ríomhtar Deacracht](#conas-a-ríomhtar-deacracht) le fáil amach conas a chinntear na leibhéil seo.

Cliceáil aon chárta chun an seinnteoir físeáin a oscailt. Nuair a fhilleann tú ar Fiosraigh, coimeádtar d'áit sa liosta go díreach mar a d'fhág tú í.

### Gníomhartha Cainéil

Tá roghchlár **…** i ngach cárta físeán ar dheis ag an mbarr le dhá rogha:

- **Liostáil** — Beidh físeáin ón gcainéal seo ar dtús i do mholtaí. Coimeádtar thart ar 25% de gach leathanach le haghaidh cainéil shuibscríofa, mar sin feicfidh tú a n-ábhar is nuaí i gcónaí in aice leis an mbarr. Tá sé seo úsáideach do chainéil ar mhaith leat leanúint go rialta — asraonta nuachta, cruthaitheoirí oideachasúla, nó do bhlagálaithe is fearr leat.

- **Níl suim agam** — Fiosrófar físeáin ón gcainéal seo go hiomlán ó do mholtaí. Tá sé seo úsáideach do chainéil a thagann aníos go seasta ach nach bhfuil oiriúnach — b'fhéidir go bhfuil an t-ábhar ró-ard, ró-éasca, nó nach mbaineann le do spriocanna foghlama.

Sábháiltear do roghanna cainéil in aghaidh na teanga, mar sin ní dhéanfaidh suibscríobh chuig cainéal nuachta Seapáinis difear do mholtaí Cóiréis. Is féidir leat do shuibscríbhinní agus cainéil fholaithe go léir a bhainistiú ó do phróifíl.

## Conas a Ríomhtar Deacracht

Sanntar scór deacrachta do gach físeán bunaithe ar mhinicíocht na bhfocal ina fhotheidil. Úsáideann an córas liostaí minicíochta Zipf in aghaidh na teanga — táblaí móra a chuireann rangú ar cé chomh coitianta is atá gach focal i dtéacs fíorshaoil. Tá minicíocht ard ag focal mar "an" (coitianta), agus minicíocht íseal ag "sesquipedalian" (annamh).

Déantar na scóir a ghrúpáil i 7 leibhéal ag úsáid tairsí easpónantúla: is leibhéal 1 iad na focail is minice 1/127, is leibhéal 2 iad an chéad 2/127 eile, is leibhéal 3 iad an chéad 4/127 eile, agus mar sin de — ag dúbailt gach céim. Clúdaíonn Leibhéal 7 na focail is annamha 64/127.

Toisc go mbíonn dáiltí minicíochta focal difriúil idir teangacha, tá na tairsí **sainiúil don teanga**. Léarscáileann scór deacrachta 0.008 in Seapáinis go dtí JLPT N1 (leibhéal 6), agus léarscáileann an scór céanna in Cóiréis go dtí TOPIK 3 (leibhéal 4). Faigheann an frontend na tairsí seo ón backend uair amháin agus úsáideann sé iad chun gach cárta físeáin a lipéadú.

Sábháiltear do roghanna cainéil in aghaidh na teanga, mar sin ní dhéanfaidh suibscríobh chuig cainéal nuachta Seapáinis difear do mholtaí Cóiréis. Is féidir leat do shuibscríbhinní agus cainéil fholaithe go léir a bhainistiú ó do phróifíl.

## Leideanna

- Socraigh do leibhéal inniúlachta ar do [leathanach próifíle](/docs/account/profile) ionas go dtosóidh Fiosraigh leis an scagaire ceart
- Athraigh leibhéil le hábhar níos éasca nó níos deacra a fháil — tá athrú ar ais láithreach
- Úsáid [Ceol agus Siamsaíocht](/docs/media/music) le haghaidh físeáin cheoil agus ábhar siamsaíochta
- Tá do stair féachana príobháideach agus ní úsáidtear í ach amháin chun an físeán céanna a sheachaint faoi dhó

title: Subtitle Search
content:
# Subtitle Search

Search for any word or phrase across millions of video subtitles. See how native speakers actually use it — in context, with timestamps, ready to watch.

## How It Works

Type a word or phrase in your target language, and Language Player searches every subtitle line in its video database. Results show you exactly where that word appears, in which video, and at what moment.

You can access subtitle search in two ways:

- **From a dictionary entry** — open the **Examples from Videos** tab on any dictionary entry page. It searches for the headword across all subtitles automatically.
- **From the explore page** — use the search bar on the Explore page to find words or phrases in video subtitles.

## Understanding the Results

Each result shows:

- **The subtitle line** containing your search term, with the matching word or phrase highlighted.
- **The video title** — click it to open that video.
- **A timestamp link** — click it to jump directly to the moment the line is spoken. The video starts playing from that exact subtitle line.

Results are grouped by video. If a word appears multiple times in the same video, each occurrence gets its own result line. This way you can compare different contexts for the same word in the same video.

## Exact vs. Partial Matching

By default, the search matches inflected and conjugated forms of your word. For example, searching for "食べる" (to eat) also finds "食べた" (ate), "食べます" (eat, polite), and other forms.

Toggle **Exact Match** to restrict results to the exact form you typed. This is useful when you want to see how a specific conjugation or tense is used, rather than all forms of the word.

## Tips

- **Use it to verify usage** — before using a new word yourself, check how native speakers use it in real conversations.
- **Jump between examples** — click different timestamps for the same word to hear it in different contexts, accents, and speaking speeds.
- **Combine with saved words** — save a word from the dictionary, then use the Examples tab to find videos where you can hear it in action.

title: Cláir Theilifíse
content:
# Cláir Theilifíse

Brabhsáil sraitheanna teilifíse i do sprioctheanga agus féach ar eipeasóid iomlána le fotheidil idirghníomhacha dhátheangacha.

## Conas a Oibríonn Sé

Liostaíonn an leathanach Cláir Theilifíse gach sraith teilifíse atá ar fáil i do sprioctheanga. Is cárta é gach seó le íomhá clúdaigh, teideal an tseó, bliain eisithe, agus tír thionscnaimh. Cliceáil aon seó chun a eipeasóidí a fheiceáil.

Tá eipeasóidí eagraithe de réir sraithe agus uimhrithe in ord. Cliceáil aon eipeasóid chun í a oscailt san [Imreoir Físeáin](/docs/media/video-player) — faigheann gach eipeasóid fotheidil idirghníomhacha agus cuardach foclóra, díreach mar aon fhíseán eile.

Nuair a sheinneann tú eipeasóid, cuirtear an tsraith iomlán ar an gcúl liosta go huathoibríoch. Úsáid na cnaipí **Roimhe Seo** agus **Ar Aghaidh** chun bogadh idir eipeasóidí gan filleadh ar an liosta.

## Seónna a Aimsiú

### Cuardach

Úsáid an barra cuardaigh ag barr an leathanaigh chun seó a aimsiú de réir ainm. Clóscríobh eochairfhocal i do sprioctheanga agus scagann an liosta láithreach — ní gá Enter a bhrú.

### Sórtáil

Sórtáil an liosta ar thrí bhealach:

- **Is mó a breathnaíodh** — seónna leis na heipeasóidí is mó faire ar dtús. Go maith le haghaidh sraitheanna coitianta a aimsiú.
- **Teideal** — in ord aibítre de réir teideal an tseó. Go maith nuair atá an t-ainm ar eolas agat.
- **Bliain** — seónna is nua ar dtús. Go maith le haghaidh sraitheanna le déanaí a fháil amach.

### Scagaire Logánta

Labhraítear roinnt teangacha i dtíortha iolracha. Mar shampla, tagann teilifís Fraincis ón bhFrainc, ón mBeilg, ón Eilvéis, agus ó Cheanada. Ligeann an roghchlár anuas **SCAG DE RÉIR LOGCHAIGHDEÁIN** duit an liosta a chúngú go seónna ó thír ar leith. Ní thaispeánann sé ach amháin nuair atá níos mó ná logánta amháin ar fáil.

## Radharc Eipeasóide

Tar éis duit seó a chliceáil, feicfidh tú:

- An **teideal seó** agus tír thionscnaimh ag an mbarr
- Liosta de **gach eipeasóid**, uimhrithe agus sórtáilte de réir teidil
- Taispeánann gach ró eipeasóide mionsamhail, teideal, fad, agus comhaireamh amhairc

Cliceáil aon eipeasóid chun tús a fheiceáil. Osclaíonn an t-imreoir físeáin leis an tsraith iomlán ar an gcúl liosta — is féidir leat léim idir eipeasóidí le rialtáin Roimhe Seo/Ar Aghaidh san imreoir.

Filleann cnaipe **Ar ais** ag an mbarr thú chuig liosta na seónna. Coinnítear d'áit sa liosta, ionas gur féidir leat seó eile a phiocadh go tapa gan tosú arís.

## Leideanna

- Sórtáil de réir **Is mó a breathnaíodh** agus tú ag iniúchadh teanga nua — is gnách go mbíonn cáilíocht fotheideal níos fearr ag seónna coitianta
- Leabharmharcáil leathanach seó chun léim díreach chuig a eipeasóidí gan cuardach
- Cuirtear an tsraith iomlán ar an gcúl liosta nuair a sheinneann tú eipeasóid, ionas gur féidir leat sraith a ithe gan bhriseadh
- Úsáid an leathanach [Fiosraigh](/docs/media/explore) le haghaidh físeáin aonair, ní sraitheanna teilifíse iomlána
- Má tá eipeasóidí ag seó in ilteangacha, scag de réir logánta le feiceáil ach na cinn i do sprioctheanga

title: Stair féachana
content:
# Stair féachana

Sábhálfar gach físeán a fhéachann tú i do stair. Tóg suas mar a d'fhág tú, athsheinn ceanáin, agus coinnigh súil ar a bhfuil á fheiceáil agat.

## Conas a Oibríonn sé

Sábhálann Imreoir Teanga do stair faire go huathoibríoch. Gach 15 soicind agus tú ag féachaint ar fhíseán, taifeadtar do shuíomh athsheinm reatha. Nuair a fhilleann tú ar fhíseán níos déanaí, is féidir leat leanúint ar aghaidh ón áit ar fhág tú.

Tá do stair in aghaidh an teanga – má athraíonn tú ó Seapáinis go Cóiréis taispeántar liosta difriúil. Tá sé ceangailte le do chuntas freisin, mar sin leanann sé tú trasna gléasanna.

## Féachaint ar Do Stair

Oscail **Stair féachana** ó phríomh-roghchlár na loingseoireachta. Feicfidh tú liosta de gach físeán a d'fhéach tú i do theanga sprice reatha, na cinn is déanaí ar dtús.

Taispeánann gach mír:

- **Mionsamhail** le cnaipe súgartha a fheictear ar an mhóibh
- **Teideal an fhíseáin**
- **An fad** agus **an dáta** ar fhéach tú é
- **Barra dul chun cinn** ar an mionsamhail – líne daite ag bun a thaispeánann cé mhéad atá feicthe agat
- **Céatadán** mar "{pct} féachaint air" ionas go mbeidh a fhios agat do shuíomh ar an bhfráma

Cliceáil ar aon fhíseán chun féachaint arís. Bíonn an stair iomlán mar do scuaine, ionas gur féidir leat léim idir físeáin ar fhéach tú orthu le déanaí ag baint úsáide as na rialuithe Roimhe/Ar Aghaidh sa seinnteoir.

## Áit a bhFeictear Stair

Taispeánann do stair faire in dhá áit:

- **Leathanach Stair féachana** – do stair iomlán don teanga reatha, le gach físeán a d'fhéach tú
- **Do [Próifíl](/docs/account/profile)** – na 5 fhíseán is déanaí a d'fhéach tú, le nasc chun an liosta iomlán a fheiceáil

## Atosú ar Athsheinm

Nuair a osclaíonn tú arís físeán a d'fhéach tú cheana, athshlánaíonn an seinnteoir do shuíomh sábháilte. Léiríonn an barra dul chun cinn ar an mbarra cuardaigh agus an céatadán i do liosta stair na háit ar fhág tú.

Sábhálfar suíomh fiú má dhúnann tú an cluaisín leathbhealach tríd an bhfíseán. Chomh fada is a bhí tú ag féachaint ar feadh cúpla soicind ar a laghad, coimeádtar d'áit.

## Príobháideacht

Tá do stair faire príobháideach. Ní fheiceann ach tusa é nuair atá tú sínithe isteach. Úsáidtear é le:

- Do chuid físeán ar fhéach tú le déanaí a thaispeáint le haghaidh rochtain éasca
- Gan físeáin a d'fhéach tú cheana a mholadh ar an leathanach [Fiosraigh](/docs/media/explore)

## Leideanna

- Bain úsáid as do stair mar bhealach tapa chun físeán nár chríochnaigh tú a athsheinm
- Tugann an barra dul chun cinn ar gach mionsamhail tuiscint láithreach duit ar an áit ar fhág tú
- Athraigh teangacha le stair ar leith a fheiceáil do gach teanga atá á foghlaim agat
- Tá do stair teoranta do do L2 reatha – ní fheicfidh tú físeáin Seapáinis nuair atá tú i mód Cóiréis

title: Léitheoir EPUB
content:
# Léitheoir EPUB

Read EPUB e-books with interactive word lookup, per-block translation, and progress that persists across sessions.

## Getting Started

### Upload an EPUB

1. Navigate to **Reading → Léitheoir EPUB** in the menu
2. **Drag & drop** an `.epub` file onto the upload zone, or click **Browse** to select one from your device
3. The cover image appears — tap it to start reading

The file is stored locally in your browser (IndexedDB). Next time you visit, it will load automatically and you'll resume from where you left off.

### Navigation

| Feature | How |
|---|---|
| **Next/Previous chapter** | Use the buttons at the top of the sidebar, or click chapter titles in the table of contents |
| **Collapse/expand sidebar** | Click the `≡` toggle in the top-right corner of the title bar |
| **Close the book** | Click `✕ Close` in the title bar to return to the upload screen |
| **Page turn within a chapter** | Use `←` / `→` keys or the page controls at the bottom of the reader |
| **Table of contents** | Nested TOC items are indented for easy navigation |

### Reading Features

- **Click any word** to look up its dictionary definition, pronunciation, and example sentences
- **Per-block translation** — Click the `Languages` icon in the page nav bar to translate the current page's visible blocks
- **Auto-translate on page turn** — When translation is enabled, the next page's content is translated automatically
- **Inline translation display** — On wide screens, original and translation appear side by side. On narrow screens, translation appears below each block.

## Supported Formats

- **`.epub`** — Standard EPUB files (EPUB 2 and EPUB 3)
- **`.epub` with furigana/ruby** — Seapáinis books with ruby annotations are stripped of furigana, keeping only the base kanji text
- **Vertical text** — Books with CSS `writing-mode: vertical-rl` are detected (display uses standard horizontal layout for readability)

## Progress Saving

Your reading position is saved automatically in your browser:

- **Current chapter** is saved when you switch chapters
- **Text anchor** (the first ~40 characters of the visible page) is saved when you turn pages
- On your next visit, the book reloads and scrolls to the correct position

**Note:** Progress is stored locally (IndexedDB), not synced to the cloud. Only one book is stored at a time — uploading a new one replaces the previous.

## Getting Free EPUBs

- **[Project Gutenberg](https://www.gutenberg.org/)** — 70,000+ free ebooks in many languages (look for " EPUB with images" or " Plain Text UTF-8")
- **[Aozora Bunko](https://www.aozora.gr.jp/)** (青空文庫) — Seapáinis literature, public domain
- **[Wikisource](https://wikisource.org/)** — Public domain texts in many languages, downloadable as EPUB

title: Notes Reader
content:
# Notes Reader

Paste or write text in your target language and read it with interactive word lookup, per-block translations, and a built-in note-taking system.

## How It Works

The Notes Reader lets you bring your own text — paste an article, type a journal entry, or load a web page. The reader tokenizes the text so every word becomes clickable. You can look up words in the dictionary, see translations, and save everything as a note that you can return to later.

## Getting Text In

There are three ways to add text:

- **Write or paste** — Switch to the Edit tab and type or paste directly into the text area. Markdown formatting is supported (headings, lists, blockquotes, code, tables).
- **Load a URL** — Paste a web page URL into the URL input at the top. The reader fetches the page and converts it to readable text.
- **Líon le sampla** — Click "Fill with sample" to load a short example text in your target language, useful for exploring the reader's features.

Each piece of text you work with is saved as a **note**. All your notes appear in the sidebar on the left. Click any note to load it back — your text, translations, and reading position are remembered.

## Reading

### Edit Mode

The **Edit** tab is where you add or edit text. Type directly into the text area, or paste from an external source. When you're ready to read, click **Déan comarthaíocht** to make every word interactive.

Markdown is fully supported. Use `#` for headings, `*` or `-` for lists, `>` for blockquotes, and backticks for code. The reader preserves your formatting in the Read tab.

### Read Mode

The **Read** tab shows your text paginated to fit the screen. Each page shows as much text as fits without scrolling.

**Navigate pages** with the `←` `→` buttons at the bottom, or use your keyboard: `←` and `↑` for previous page, `→`, `↓`, and `Space` for next page.

## Interactive Words

After tokenization, every word is clickable. Tap or click any word to open the [Popup Dictionary](/docs/vocab/popup-dictionary). You can see definitions, pronunciations, example sentences, and save the word to your vocabulary.

Words you've previously saved are shown with a quick gloss — the first definition appears inline next to the word.

## Aistriúchán

Toggle the **Aistriúchán** switch in the page navigation bar to show or hide translations. This setting is remembered across sessions.

When enabled, translations appear inline — on wide screens they sit next to the original text, and on narrow screens they appear below each paragraph. Translations are fetched per page and appear as you navigate.

**Per-block actions** let you interact with each paragraph individually. Hover over any text block to reveal a `⋮` menu with these options:

- **Cóipeáil** — Copy the text to your clipboard
- **Labhair** — Read the text aloud with text-to-speech
- **Lig do DeepSeek Míniú** — Get an AI breakdown of the text's grammar and structure
- **Aistriúchán** — See a popup translation for just that block

## Managing Notes

All your notes appear in the sidebar. You can:

- **Create a new note** — Click "New Note" to start with a blank text area
- **Rename a note** — Click the `⋮` next to a note and choose Rename
- **Delete a note** — Click the `⋮` next to a note and choose Delete

Your note is saved as you type. There's no save button — changes are saved to your account after a brief pause. When you switch between notes or close the reader, your latest changes are always preserved.

## See Also

- [Léitheoir gréasáin](/docs/reading/web-reader) — Read web articles by URL without saving notes
- [Léitheoir EPUB](/docs/reading/epub) — Read EPUB books with chapter navigation
- [Popup Dictionary](/docs/vocab/popup-dictionary) — How clicking words works
- [Foclóir](/docs/vocab/dictionary) — Full dictionary features

## Tips

- Use markdown headings to organize longer texts — they help break content into readable sections
- The `⋮` menu on each block is a quick way to look up a single word or phrase without switching tabs
- Keyboard navigation (`←` `→`) is faster than clicking page buttons for extended reading
- Rename your notes to something descriptive — "Chapter 3 notes" is easier to find later than "Untitled"

title: Web Reader
content:
# Web Reader

Paste a URL and read any web page in your target language with interactive word lookup and translations. No account needed.

## How It Works

Enter the URL of a web page — a news article, a blog post, a Wikipedia page, or any public webpage. The Web Reader fetches the page, strips away navigation and ads, and displays the main content as clean, readable text. Every word becomes clickable for dictionary lookup.

The Web Reader is read-only — it doesn't save anything to your account. If you want to keep your text and come back to it later, use the [Notes Reader](/docs/reading/reader) instead.

## Loading a Page

1. Paste a full URL (starting with `https://`) into the input at the top of the page
2. Click **Lódáil**
3. The page content appears as clean text, ready to read

You can also share a link directly. Add `?url=` to the Web Reader URL:

```
/en/zh/web-reader?url=https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/...
```

This loads the page when someone opens the link.

## What Gets Kept

The Web Reader extracts the main content of a page and removes clutter:

- Navigation menus, sidebars, headers, and footers are stripped
- Wikipedia edit links, reference lists, infoboxes, and metadata are removed
- The main article body is preserved — paragraphs, headings, lists, and links
- Relative links are rewritten to point back to the original page

The cleaned content is displayed as formatted text with markdown styling. Headings, bullet lists, blockquotes, and code blocks all render as you'd expect.

## Interactive Words

After the page loads, click **Déan comarthaíocht** to make every word interactive. Tap or click any word to open the [Popup Dictionary](/docs/vocab/popup-dictionary). You can see definitions, pronunciations, and example sentences, and save words to your vocabulary.

Words you've previously saved are highlighted — the first definition appears inline next to the word as a quick reminder.

## Translation

Toggle the **Translation** switch to show or hide translations. When enabled, translations appear inline — on wide screens they sit next to the original text, and on narrow screens they appear below each paragraph. Translations load as you navigate between pages.

**Per-block actions** let you interact with each paragraph individually. Hover over any text block to reveal a `⋮` menu with these options:

- **Cóipeáil** — Copy the text to your clipboard
- **Labhair** — Read the text aloud with text-to-speech
- **Lig do DeepSeek Míniú** — Get an AI breakdown of the text's grammar and structure
- **Aistriúchán** — See a popup translation for just that block

## Page Navigation

The text is paginated to fit your screen. Use the `←` `→` buttons at the bottom to move between pages, or use your keyboard: `←` and `↑` for previous page, `→`, `↓`, and `Space` for next page.

## See Also

- [Notes Reader](/docs/reading/reader) — Write or paste your own text, save notes, and edit content
- [EPUB Reader](/docs/reading/epub) — Read EPUB books with chapter navigation
- [Popup Dictionary](/docs/vocab/popup-dictionary) — How clicking words works

## Tips

- Wikipedia articles work particularly well — the content extraction is tuned for Wikipedia's layout
- Use the `?url=` parameter to bookmark specific articles in your target language
- The Web Reader doesn't save your text — if you want to annotate or come back later, copy the URL and paste it into the Notes Reader instead
- Long articles benefit from keyboard navigation (`←` `→`) for faster reading

title: Foclóir
content:
# Foclóir

The dictionary is your instant word lookup tool. It works everywhere — in subtitles, in search, and on its own dedicated page.

## Looking Up Words

You can look up a word in three ways:

- **Tap any word** in the subtitles or transcript while watching a video. A popup opens with the definition, pronunciation, and a bookmark button. See [Popup Dictionary](/docs/vocab/popup-dictionary) for details.
- **Use the search bar** at the top of the Dictionary page. Type a word in your target language and press Enter.
- **Click a saved word** in your vocabulary list to jump straight to its full entry.

The search bar is always there — it never moves. Whether you're browsing results or reading a full entry, the search bar stays at the top so you can look up another word instantly.

## What You Get

Every entry gives you the essentials up front:

- **Definitions** in your native language, ordered by relevance
- **Pronunciation** — tap the speaker icon to hear it aloud, plus a phonetic guide (Pinyin, Romaji, or IPA)
- **Part of speech** — noun, verb, adjective, and so on
- **Proficiency level** — where the word falls on scales like CEFR (A1–C2), HSK (1–6), or JLPT (N5–N1)

Depending on the language and the word, you might also see:

- **Alternate scripts** — for Sínis, see the word in both simplified and traditional. For Vítneaimis, see the Chữ Hán form. For Cóiréis, see the Hanja. You control which scripts appear in [Socruithe](/settings).
- **Classifiers** — for Sínis, see which measure words go with the noun (like 个, 本, 张). For Fraincis or Gearmáinis, see the grammatical gender.
- **Textbook coverage** — if the word appears in a textbook like the HSK Standard Course, you'll see exactly which book, lesson, and dialog it's from.

### Tabs

The entry page has tabs next to the definitions panel:

- **Samplaí ó fhíseáin** — see real subtitle lines from YouTube videos that contain this word. Great for hearing how it's actually used. Learn more in [Subtitle Search](/docs/vocab/subs-search).
- **Réimnithe** — full conjugation or declension tables for verbs and adjectives. Available for Seapáinis, Cóiréis, Rúisis, Úcráinis, Béarla, Fraincis, Gearmáinis, Spainnis, Iodáilis, and Ísiltíris.
- **AI Explanation** — a plain-Béarla breakdown of the word's meaning, usage, and nuances. Generated on the fly by DeepSeek.

## Where Dictionary Entries Come From

Language Player uses curated, versioned dictionaries built from open data:

| Language | Dictionary | Entries |
|---|---|---|
| Sínis | HSK CEDICT | 120,000+ |
| Cantainis | CC-Canto | 50,000+ |
| Seapáinis | EDICT | 170,000+ |
| Cóiréis | Kengdic | 120,000+ |
| KlingonGenericName | KlingonGenericNameska | 3,000+ |
| 60+ other languages | Wiktionary | varies by language |

If a word isn't in any dictionary — like a rare dialect word or a new slang term — the app asks an AI model to generate a definition on the spot. These AI-generated entries are marked so you know they're not from a curated source.

## Saving Words

Click the bookmark icon on any dictionary entry to save the word to your personal vocabulary list. Your saved words appear in the sidebar while you're browsing the dictionary, so you can quickly jump between them.

Saved words sync across devices if you're logged in. You can browse and manage them on the [Focail shábháilte](/docs/vocab/saved-words) page. Use the [Athbhreithniú](/docs/vocab/review) feature to practice your saved words with spaced repetition — the app schedules reviews so you see each word just before you'd forget it.

## Tips

- **Click the speaker icon** next to any word to hear its pronunciation. This works in the popup, the search results, and the full entry page.
- **Use the sidebar toggle** (the panel icon in the search bar) to show or hide your saved words list while browsing entries.
- **Search Google Images** from any entry page — the link is at the bottom of the definitions panel. Useful for concrete nouns when a picture is worth a thousand words.
- **If a word's definition seems off**, check the AI Explanation tab. The AI sometimes catches nuances that dictionary definitions miss.
- **Switch scripts** in [Socruithe](/settings) if you prefer traditional Sínis characters or want to see Hanja alongside Cóiréis Hangul.

title: Popup Dictionary
content:
# Popup Dictionary

Click any word in the subtitles or transcript, and a popup opens with everything you need — definitions, pronunciation, and a quick way to save the word.

## How It Works

While watching a video, every word in the subtitles is clickable. When you tap a word:

1. A popup appears next to the word with dictionary entries from our curated dictionaries.
2. If the word isn't in any dictionary, an AI model generates a definition on the spot.
3. You can scroll through multiple entries if the word has several meanings.

The popup stays open until you click outside it or press the close button.

## What's in the Popup

Each dictionary entry in the popup is a compact card showing:

- **Headword** with pronunciation and alternate scripts
- **Definitions** ordered by relevance
- **Part of speech** and proficiency level badges
- **Save button** — click the bookmark icon to add this word to your vocabulary list

Below the dictionary entries, an **AI Explanation** section gives you a plain-language breakdown of the word's meaning and usage. This is especially helpful for words with multiple senses or tricky grammar.

## Saving Words from the Popup

Click the bookmark icon on any entry to save it. The app automatically fetches all inflected and conjugated forms of the word, so every form you encounter in the future will be recognized as saved.

When you save a word from a video, the subtitle line and video title are stored as context. You'll see exactly where you first encountered the word when you browse your [Focail shábháilte](/docs/vocab/saved-words) list.

## Full Foclóir Entry

Click any entry card in the popup to jump to the full dictionary page. The full page gives you everything the popup does, plus:

- Conjugation tables for verbs and adjectives
- Real video examples from our subtitle database
- Textbook appearances (HSK Standard Course and more)
- A Google Images search link

## Unrecognized Focail shábháilte

If you have a word saved in your vocabulary but none of the popup's dictionary entries match it, the popup shows an "unrecognized saved word" warning. This can happen when a saved word uses an older ID format that doesn't match the current dictionary. The warning lets you know the word is still in your list — it just couldn't be matched to a specific entry in this popup.

## Tips

- **Click the entry card** (not just the bookmark) to open the full dictionary page for more detail.
- **Save first, read later** — bookmark interesting words as you watch, then review them in your [Focail shábháilte](/docs/vocab/saved-words) list after the video.
- **The popup works on any word** — even conjugated verbs, declined nouns, and words with typos. The lemmatizer finds the dictionary form automatically.

title: Athbhreithniú
content:
# Athbhreithniú

Athbhreithniú do stór focal coigilte le cártaí splancacha athrá spásáilte.

## Conas a Oibríonn sé

Tosaíonn gach focal coigilte mar chárta splancach. Taispeánann an tosach an abairt inar shábháil tú an focal — tá an focal féin aibhsithe ionas go bhfeicfidh tú go tapa é. Is é do chúram an bhrí a mheabhrú ón gcomhthéacs.

Tapaigh an cárta (nó brúigh Spás) chun an cúl a nochtadh. Feicfidh tú iontráil iomlán an fhoclóra le sainmhínithe, samplaí, infhilleadh, agus míniú AI. Déan comparáid idir an méid a mheabhraigh tú agus an sainmhíniú iarbhír, ansin rátáil tú féin.

Braitheann an chéad uair eile a fheiceann tú an focal ar do rátáil. Bíonn focail a bhfuil aithne mhaith agat orthu le feiceáil níos lú minice. Tagann focail a mbíonn deacracht agat leo ar ais níos luaithe. Tugtar athrá spásáilte air seo — an teicníc chéanna a úsáideann Anki.

## Cárta a Rátáil

Tar éis duit an cúl a nochtadh, rátáil cé chomh maith agus a mheabhraigh tú:

| Cnaipe | Eochair | Cathain a úsáid |
|---|---|---|
| Arís | 1 | Rinne tú dearmad go hiomlán |
| Deacair | 2 | D'éirigh leat le deacracht |
| Maith | 3 | D'éirigh leat i gceart |
| Éasca | 4 | D'éirigh leat láithreach |

Is féidir leat leath **clé** an chárta a thapú le haghaidh Arís, nó leath **dheas** le haghaidh Maith. Dearbhaíonn teachtaireacht dhaite do rogha.

## Comhaireamh na gCártaí

Taispeánann barr an scáileáin trí tháscaire daite:

- **Gorm** — Cártaí nua atá á bhfeiceáil agat den chéad uair inniu
- **Dearg** — Cártaí atá á bhfoghlaim agat arís tar éis dearmad
- **Glas** — Cártaí ag filleadh le haghaidh athbhreithnithe sceidealta

Is é 20 an teorainn laethúil le haghaidh cártaí nua de réir réamhshocraithe. Is féidir leat é a athrú i [Socruithe](/docs/general/settings).

## Comhthéacs & Aistriúchán

Taispeánann gach cárta an abairt inar shábháil tú an focal. Tá foirm bheacht an fhocail aibhsithe. Faoi bhun sin, feicfidh tú cá as a dtáinig an focal (teideal an fhíseáin nó ainm an téacs, chomh maith leis an dáta).

Má tá "Taispeáin aistriúchán" cumasaithe agat i Socruithe, taispeánann an cárta aistriúchán Béarla na habairte nuair a nochtann tú an cúl. Mura bhfuil aistriúchán coigilte ann, faigheann sé ceann go huathoibríoch.

Tá roghchlár aimsithe (na trí phonc) ar an abairt chomhthéacs le haghaidh an téacs a chóipeáil, a labhairt os ard, míniú AI a fháil, nó é a aistriú ar an láthair.

## Focal a Bhaint

Chun focal a bhaint ó do phaca athbhreithnithe, díshábháil é ó iontráil an fhoclóra ar chúl an chárta. Sleamhnaíonn an chéad chárta eile isteach ina áit go huathoibríoch.

## Aicearraí Méarchláir

- **Spás** nó **Iontráil** — Nocht an cúl, nó rátáil Maith (nuair a bhíonn an cúl le feiceáil)
- **1–4** — Rátáil Arís, Deacair, Maith, Éasca (nuair a bhíonn an cúl le feiceáil)

## Leideanna

- Athbhreithniú go laethúil. Fiú 5 nóiméad a dhéanann difríocht.
- Bí dian le Arís. Mura bhféadfá é a mheabhrú sa saol fíor, áirítear mar theip é.
- Úsáid an abairt chomhthéacs. Tá sé níos éifeachtaí an focal a fheiceáil ina abairt bhunaidh ná é a mheabhrú ina aonar.
- Tapaigh na trí phonc ar an abairt chomhthéacs chun an líne iomlán a aistriú nó a mhíniú sula rátáilfidh tú.
- Coigeartaigh do theorainn laethúil cártaí nua i Socruithe má bhraitheann 20 an iomarca nó róbheag.

title: Saved Words
content:
# Saved Words

Your personal vocabulary collection. Every word you bookmark from subtitles, the dictionary, or the popup ends up here.

## How Words Get Saved

You can save a word from anywhere:

- **In a video** — click a word in the subtitles, then hit the bookmark icon in the popup.
- **In the dictionary** — click the bookmark on any search result or entry page.
- **From the sidebar** — while browsing one entry, click a saved word in the sidebar to jump to it.

When you save a word, the app automatically fetches all its inflected and conjugated forms. This means when you encounter "went" later, it's recognized as the same word you saved as "go."

## Browsing Your Collection

The Saved Words page lists every word you've bookmarked for your current target language. You can:

- **Search** — type in the filter box to find words by their form, the sentence they appeared in, or the video title.
- **Sort** — switch between newest first or alphabetical order.
- **Scan by date** — words saved today are grouped separately from older ones.

Each word row shows the head form, its definition, the sentence context, and where it came from (video title, textbook, or dictionary).

Click any word to open its full dictionary entry.

## Export and Clear

- **Export** — download your entire vocabulary list as a JSON file. Useful for backups or importing into other tools.
- **Clear all** — remove every saved word for this language. This can't be undone.

## Review and Practice

Saved words feed into the [Review](/docs/vocab/review) system. The app uses spaced repetition to schedule each word for review just before you'd forget it. Words are shown as flashcards — see the word, recall the meaning, and rate how well you remembered.

A colored dot next to each word in your saved list shows its review status: blue for new, amber for due, red for overdue, green for reviewed.

## Tips

- **Save as you watch** — bookmark interesting words during a video, then review them later. You don't need to stop and study mid-video.
- **Use the filter** to find all words from a specific video or TV show. Type part of the video title in the search box.
- **Export regularly** as a backup. The JSON file includes every form, definition, and context for each word.
- **Click through to the entry** for any saved word to see its full conjugation tables, video examples, and AI explanation.
